title: CKA 2025 Mock Exam
description: A full 15-question CKA-style mock exam covering Gateway API, CNI, storage, RBAC, scheduling, and more — with built-in verification for every question.

steps.title: Q1 (8%) — Gateway API: Install & Basic Routing

verify.hint: Check that GatewayClass 'nginx' exists and Gateway 'web-gateway' in namespace 'gw-demo' has condition Programmed=True.
Check that HTTPRoute 'app-route' exists in 'gw-demo' with backendRefs for both app-v1-svc (weight 80) and app-v2-svc (weight 20), and a header-match rule sending x-canary:true to app-v2-svc.
Check that the cilium DaemonSet is running in kube-system, both nodes are Ready, and Hubble is enabled.
Check /api/v1/nodes/node01/proxy/configz for maxPods=80, evictionHard memory.available=200Mi, systemReserved cpu=200m.
Check HPA 'orders-hpa' exists in 'metrics-demo', targets 'orders-api', has minReplicas=2 and maxReplicas=10.
Check Deployment 'slow-boot' in 'probes-lab' has all three probe types configured, and startupProbe failureThreshold × periodSeconds ≥ 120.
Check Pod 'audit-agent' in 'proj-vol' is Running and all four projected sources are present under /etc/agent/.
Check that a snapshot exists under /opt/backups/, the cluster is healthy, and namespace 'will-be-lost' no longer exists.
Check PV 'app1-pv' and PVC 'app1-pvc' are Bound, and Deployment 'writer' has at least one ready replica in 'storage-lab'.
Check that a default-deny policy (empty podSelector, both Ingress and Egress in policyTypes) exists in 'np-lab', plus at least 3 selective-allow policies.
Check Deployment 'web-with-logger' in 'sidecar-lab' has an initContainer with restartPolicy: Always and a shared emptyDir volume.
Check that the worker node (node01) is in Ready state.
Check all nodes report the same kubelet version and all kube-system pods are Running or Completed.
Check ServiceAccount 'deploy-bot', a Role granting deployments/replicasets/pods access, and a RoleBinding exist in 'rbac-lab'.
Check controlplane has taint workload=critical:NoSchedule, both nodes have zone labels, and Deployment 'critical-app' has topologySpreadConstraints with maxSkew=1.
